# Triaxial Resistivity Induction Logs

**Summary**: A logging tool that measures the difference in resistivity between horizontal and vertical directions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2013-abdullah|Abdullah, 2013]] used triaxial-resistivity-induction-logs to determine resistivity anisotropy in thin beds.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Identified a high anisotropy factor of 2-3 in the thin-bedded pay zone, confirming lamination. ([[2013-abdullah|Abdullah, 2013, p. 91]])
